creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: naddy
Date: Mon May 12 21:31:01 2014
New Revision: 353898
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353898
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353898/

Log:
  Update to 1.27.1.  Bug fixes:
  * Fix unquoting of file names obtained via the -T option.
  * Fix GNU long link header timestamp (backward compatibility).
  * Fix extracting sparse members from star archives.
  
  PR:		189675
  Submitted by:	Jason Harris <jharris@widomaker.com>

Modified:
  head/archivers/gtar/Makefile
  head/archivers/gtar/distinfo

Modified: head/archivers/gtar/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/archivers/gtar/Makefile	Mon May 12 21:13:27 2014	(r353897)
+++ head/archivers/gtar/Makefile	Mon May 12 21:31:01 2014	(r353898)
@@ -2,10 +2,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	tar
-PORTVERSION=	1.27
+PORTVERSION=	1.27.1
 CATEGORIES=	archivers sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
-MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
+MASTER_SITES=	GNU
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	g
 
 MAINTAINER=	naddy@FreeBSD.org

Modified: head/archivers/gtar/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/archivers/gtar/distinfo	Mon May 12 21:13:27 2014	(r353897)
+++ head/archivers/gtar/distinfo	Mon May 12 21:31:01 2014	(r353898)

+SHA256 (tar-1.27.1.tar.xz) = 574210bccbcf9eec889f73234a63ad6863f5b8644ac1f3d7f13871372295b7c7
